title: Ardhanareeswarar Temple
tagline: Ardhanareeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Ardhanareeswarar Temple, also known as Tirukodimāda Chenkundrūr (Tamil: திருக்கொடிமாடச் செங்குன்றூர்), is an ancient Hindu temple, located in Tiruchengode, in the southern Indi
overview.description: The Ardhanareeswarar Temple, also known as Tirukodimāda Chenkundrūr (Tamil: திருக்கொடிமாடச் செங்குன்றூர்), is an ancient Hindu temple, located in Tiruchengode, in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The temple is dedicated to Ardhanarishvara, a composite form of the Hindu deities Shiva and his consort Parvati. The Chenkottu Velavar Temple, dedicated to Murugan (Kartikeya), is also situated on the same hill, and a separate temple for Ganesha, called the Ucchi Pillaiyar Kovil, exists adjacent to the main temple complex.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kandampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kandampalayam is a Panchayat in Paramathi-Velur taluk of Namakkal District, in the state of Tamil Nadu in India.

topPlaces.name: Vellottamparappu
topPlaces.description: Vellottamparappu is a panchayat town in Kodumudi taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Pasur, Erode
topPlaces.description: Pasur is a panchayat town in Erode taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Molasi
topPlaces.description: Molasi is a village situated 16 km south of Tiruchengode in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the bank of the river Cauvery, which flows from Coorg hills.

items.note: Kandampalayam is a Panchayat in Paramathi-Velur taluk of Namakkal District, in the state of Tamil Nadu in India.
Vellottamparappu is a panchayat town in Kodumudi taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.
Pasur is a panchayat town in Erode taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.
Molasi is a village situated 16 km south of Tiruchengode in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the bank of the river Cauvery, which flows from Coorg hills.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ardhanareeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ardhanareeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ardhanareeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (100 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ardhanareeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ardhanareeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ardhanareeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ardhanareeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ardhanareeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kandampalayam, Vellottamparappu, Pasur, Erode, Molasi.
